aex_sector_notes.semis_tech: AEX remains concentration-sensitive; index-level decisions can be heavily influenced by narrow leadership.

macro_notes: March 2026 euro-area flash inflation reaccelerated to 2.5% from 1.9% in February.
Euro-area unemployment rose to 6.2% in February 2026 from 6.1% in January.
Euro-area GDP and employment both rose 0.2% q/q in Q4 2025.
